title.zh: 英国推动批发金融代币化路线图，稳定币之后的竞争焦点转向真实资产结算
title.en: The UK pushes a wholesale tokenisation roadmap as post-stablecoin competition shifts toward real-asset settlement

summary.zh: FT报道，英国数字市场工作组提出12个月路线图，重点推动回购市场代币化和数字国债试点，并估算加速批发金融数字化可带来330亿英镑经济增量。这不是普通加密货币叙事，而是交易后清算、抵押品流转和主权债发行基础设施的再设计。下一步要看央行、FCA和大型银行能否把试点做成可审计、可监管、可规模化的市场管道。
summary.en: The Financial Times reports that a UK digital markets task force has set out a 12-month roadmap for tokenised repo markets and a digital gilt pilot, estimating that faster wholesale-finance digitisation could add £33bn to the economy. This is not a retail-crypto story; it is a redesign of post-trade settlement, collateral mobility, and sovereign-debt infrastructure. The key test is whether the Bank of England, the FCA, and major banks can turn pilots into auditable, regulated, scalable market plumbing.

watch.zh: 关注数字国债是否按计划进入发行试点，以及英国路径是否迫使新加坡、瑞士、欧盟和美国加快批发结算监管框架。
watch.en: Watch whether a digital gilt pilot reaches issuance on schedule, and whether the UK path forces Singapore, Switzerland, the EU, and the US to accelerate wholesale-settlement regulation.

liveUpdates.reference: Financial Times, Speeding up digital finance shift could deliver £33bn boost to UK economy, published 2026-07-14

referenceLinks.label: FT: UK digital finance tokenisation roadmap

title.zh: Morgan Stanley上调云巨头AI资本开支预期，算力竞争继续转化为电力和供应链约束
title.en: Morgan Stanley lifts cloud AI capex estimates as compute competition keeps turning into power and supply-chain constraints

summary.zh: Investors.com报道，Morgan Stanley将Amazon、Meta和Google等公司的AI资本开支预期继续上调，认为主要云厂商到2028年的投入可能达到1.4万亿美元量级。行业含义是，AI竞争已不只是模型能力，而是芯片、内存、网络、电力、冷却、许可和施工周期的综合竞赛。对基础设施行业而言，数据中心会持续把能源、土建、机电和地方审批推到同一个瓶颈上。
summary.en: Investors.com reports that Morgan Stanley has raised AI capex estimates for Amazon, Meta, Google, and other cloud majors, with spending by leading cloud providers potentially reaching about $1.4tn by 2028. The implication is that AI competition is no longer only about model capability; it is an integrated race across chips, memory, networking, power, cooling, permitting, and construction schedules. For infrastructure, data centres will keep forcing energy, civil works, MEP systems, and local approvals into the same bottleneck.

watch.zh: 重点看电力接入、备用发电、冷却用水和本地社区反对是否比GPU供给更早成为项目交付限制。
watch.en: Watch whether grid access, backup generation, cooling water, and local opposition become delivery constraints earlier than GPU supply itself.

liveUpdates.reference: Investors.com, AI Costs Keep Rising As Morgan Stanley Ups CapEx Estimates For Amazon, Meta, published 2026-07-14

referenceLinks.label: Investors.com: Morgan Stanley raises AI capex estimates

title.zh: Shein获中国监管放行推进香港IPO，跨境电商估值重新绑定供应链合规能力
title.en: Shein receives Chinese clearance for a Hong Kong IPO, tying cross-border e-commerce valuation back to supply-chain compliance

summary.zh: WSJ报道，Shein已获得中国方面批准推进香港IPO，目标估值超过400亿美元，并计划发行H股。这个信号说明，跨境电商平台的资本市场故事正在从单纯增长速度转向合规、供应链透明度、关税压力和上市地选择。Shein仍依赖中国制造体系，但总部和资本路径更国际化，后续估值会取决于它能否同时满足投资者、监管者和欧美消费者对供应链责任的要求。
summary.en: The Wall Street Journal reports that Shein has obtained Chinese approval to proceed with a Hong Kong IPO targeting a valuation above $40bn and an H-share issuance. The signal is that cross-border e-commerce is moving from a pure growth story toward compliance, supply-chain transparency, tariff pressure, and listing-venue strategy. Shein still depends heavily on Chinese manufacturing, while its headquarters and capital route are more international; valuation will depend on whether it can satisfy investors, regulators, and Western consumers on supply-chain accountability at the same time.

watch.zh: 关注香港市场是否接受较低估值，以及欧盟小包裹税、美国贸易审查和劳动合规争议是否继续压缩平台利润率。
watch.en: Watch whether Hong Kong investors accept a lower valuation, and whether EU small-parcel fees, US trade scrutiny, and labour-compliance disputes keep compressing platform margins.

liveUpdates.reference: Wall Street Journal, Shein Targets Over $40 Billion Valuation After China Nod for IPO, published 2026-07-14

referenceLinks.label: WSJ: Shein targets Hong Kong IPO

title.zh: 新PBEE框架把修复过程纳入系统动力学，地震设计从单次损伤走向全寿命可恢复性
title.en: A new PBEE framework embeds recovery in system dynamics, moving seismic design from single-event damage to life-cycle recoverability

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2026年预印本；内容：用连续时间Markov链统一描述损伤、恢复、可靠度和韧性。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2026 preprint using a continuous-time Markov chain to describe damage, recovery, reliability, and resilience in one framework.

summary.zh: 这篇PBEE研究的重点不是再给一个地震需求模型，而是把结构状态转移和修复过程放进同一个生成矩阵中，使可靠度指标、失效概率和运行时间占比可以在统一系统动力学下计算。对结构工程师的意义在于，未来性能化抗震不应只回答一次地震后构件损伤等级，还要回答恢复速度、功能中断和长期风险。它也提示职业能力会从构件验算扩展到风险建模、恢复策略和资产运营语言。局限是示例体系较简化，工程应用仍需要真实修复时间、成本和功能恢复数据支持。
summary.en: The value of this PBEE study is not another seismic-demand model, but the placement of structural-state transitions and repair processes within a single generator matrix, allowing reliability indices, failure probabilities, and expected operational time to be evaluated under one system-dynamics framework. For structural engineers, future performance-based seismic work should not only report component damage after one earthquake; it should also address recovery speed, functional interruption, and long-term risk. The professional skill set therefore expands from member checks to risk modelling, recovery strategy, and asset-operation language. The limitation is that the examples remain simplified and practical adoption still needs real repair-time, cost, and functionality data.

caveat.zh: 该方法适合作为决策框架，但不应在缺少本地恢复数据时直接替代规范验算。
caveat.en: The method is useful as a decision framework, but it should not replace code checks when local recovery data are unavailable.

insights.reference: Nardin et al., A generalized framework for performance-based earthquake engineering, arXiv:2606.12448

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Generalized PBEE reliability and resilience framework

title.zh: 下一代AI数据中心电力架构正在从机柜问题变成园区级工程问题
title.en: Next-generation AI data-centre power architecture is shifting from a rack problem to a campus-scale engineering problem

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2026年技术综述；内容：总结AI数据中心从48V架构转向高压DC、设施级低压DC和中压固态变压器的路径。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2026 technical review of AI data-centre shifts from 48 V rack architecture toward high-ratio DC conversion, facility-level LVDC, and medium-voltage solid-state transformers.

summary.zh: 这篇综述把AI数据中心的瓶颈从芯片层面拉到电力传输、瞬态电流、热应力和设施配电层面。对土木和结构工程师而言，意义在于未来数据中心不只是普通厂房加机电设备：更高功率密度会改变楼面荷载、设备基础、母线布置、消防分区、热排布和施工阶段风险。结构专业如果只等机电专业给最终设备重量，会错过早期方案阶段最关键的空间、荷载和维护通道决策。边界是论文侧重电力电子，具体建筑规范、抗震支撑和消防要求仍需项目所在地规范补充。
summary.en: This review moves the AI data-centre bottleneck from chips to power delivery, current transients, thermal stress, and facility-level distribution. For civil and structural engineers, the implication is that future data centres are not ordinary industrial buildings with extra MEP equipment. Higher power density can change floor loading, equipment foundations, busway routing, fire zoning, thermal layout, and construction-stage risk. If the structural team waits for final MEP equipment weights, it will miss the most important early decisions on space, load paths, and maintenance access. The boundary is that the paper focuses on power electronics; local building codes, seismic restraint, and fire requirements still need project-specific treatment.

caveat.zh: 把该研究用于项目时，应与当地电力接入条件、消防规范、抗震支吊架和设备供应商数据联合审查。
caveat.en: For project use, the review should be combined with local grid-connection conditions, fire codes, seismic bracing requirements, and vendor equipment data.

insights.reference: Lee et al., Toward Next-Generation AI Data Centers, arXiv:2606.25095

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Next-generation AI data-centre power delivery

title.zh: SHM领域的domain adaptation综述提醒：监测AI最大的难点是跨桥梁、跨季节、跨工况泛化
title.en: A domain-adaptation review in SHM shows that the hardest monitoring-AI problem is generalising across bridges, seasons, and operating states

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2025年系统综述；内容：总结振动式SHM中统计对齐、对抗学习、物理约束迁移和生成式sim-to-real方法。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2025 systematic review of statistical alignment, adversarial learning, physics-informed adaptation, and generative sim-to-real methods for vibration-based SHM.

summary.zh: 结构健康监测常被包装成传感器加AI，但这篇综述指出，真正困难的是模型从一个结构、一个季节或一个实验室数据集迁移到另一个现场结构。温度、交通、边界条件、材料老化和传感器漂移都会让损伤特征分布改变。对工程师的价值是，它把AI监测从“训练准确率”拉回“可解释、可迁移、可认证”的工程问题。未来有竞争力的结构工程师需要理解信号处理、物理约束、模型不确定性和运维决策，而不只是会读取监测图表。局限是综述给出路线图多于可直接落地的统一标准。
summary.en: Structural health monitoring is often presented as sensors plus AI, but this review shows that the hard problem is transferring a model from one structure, season, or laboratory dataset to another field asset. Temperature, traffic, boundary conditions, ageing, and sensor drift all shift the feature distribution associated with damage. For engineers, the paper reframes AI monitoring from training accuracy to interpretability, transferability, and certifiability. Competitive structural engineers will need to understand signal processing, physical constraints, model uncertainty, and maintenance decision-making, not just read monitoring dashboards. The limitation is that the review offers a research roadmap rather than a single deployable standard.

caveat.zh: 短期工程应用仍应把AI输出作为筛查和优先级排序工具，而不是单独的安全结论。
caveat.en: Near-term engineering use should treat AI output as screening and prioritisation support, not as a standalone safety conclusion.

insights.reference: Zhang and Liang, Domain Adaptation in Structural Health Monitoring of Civil Infrastructure, arXiv:2512.18780

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Domain adaptation in SHM systematic review

title.zh: 冲切剪力不是普通梁剪：为什么板柱节点在中国、澳洲、欧洲和美国审查中要先问临界周长？
title.en: Punching shear is not ordinary beam shear: why slab-column review in China, Australia, Europe, and the US starts with the critical perimeter

text.zh: 无梁楼盖、地下室顶板和柱帽附近最容易被低估的问题之一是冲切剪力。它不是沿梁腹板发展的单向剪切，而是集中柱反力或集中荷载在板内形成的三维破坏锥或破坏面。中国、澳洲、欧洲和美国规范都要求在柱、墙端、开洞或集中荷载附近定义一个临界控制周长，再把竖向剪力和不平衡弯矩折算成该周长上的设计剪应力。差异在于临界周长距离、边柱和角柱修正、不平衡弯矩传递、抗剪钢筋承认方式以及混凝土抗冲切强度模型。跨规范复核时，不能只说板厚满足或混凝土强度够高；必须明确柱位置、有效高度、控制周长、开洞影响、荷载偏心和是否设置抗冲切钢筋。
text.en: One of the most commonly underestimated issues in flat plates, podium slabs, and column-head regions is punching shear. It is not one-way shear developing along a beam web; it is a three-dimensional failure cone or failure surface driven by concentrated column reaction or localised loading. Chinese, Australian, European, and US provisions all require a critical control perimeter around columns, wall ends, openings, or concentrated loads, then convert vertical shear and moment transfer into a design shear stress on that perimeter. The differences lie in the distance to the control perimeter, edge and corner column treatment, unbalanced moment transfer, recognition of punching shear reinforcement, and the concrete punching-resistance model. In cross-code review, it is not enough to say the slab is thick or the concrete is strong; the review must state column location, effective depth, control perimeter, opening effects, load eccentricity, and whether punching shear reinforcement is provided.

text.zh: 冲切验算的第一步不是选一个剪力系数，而是定义控制周长。内柱、边柱、角柱和靠近洞口的柱，其可用周长不同，直接改变设计剪应力。
text.en: The first step in punching review is not selecting a shear coefficient, but defining the control perimeter. Interior, edge, corner, and opening-adjacent columns have different available perimeters, directly changing the design shear stress.

text.zh: 柱边不平衡弯矩会让周长上的剪应力不均匀。不同规范用放大系数、偏心剪应力或专门传递模型处理，不能把全部柱反力平均摊到周长上就结束。
text.en: Unbalanced moment at the column makes shear stress non-uniform around the perimeter. Different codes use amplification factors, eccentric shear stress, or specific transfer models; simply averaging the column reaction over the perimeter is incomplete.

text.zh: 当混凝土抗力不足时，剪力钉、闭合箍筋或弯起钢筋的布置范围、锚固和外控制周长都要复核。它不是任意加几根钢筋，而是改变破坏控制面的设计。
text.en: When concrete resistance is insufficient, studs, closed links, or bent-up bars require checks for layout extent, anchorage, and the outer control perimeter. This is not arbitrary extra steel; it changes the design of the governing failure surface.

takeaway.zh: 冲切剪力审查的核心是几何和力流。板柱节点看起来只是一个局部验算，但它控制了无梁楼盖体系的鲁棒性、施工容错和突然破坏风险。跨规范沟通时，先画出控制周长和荷载偏心，比直接比较一个混凝土抗剪公式更可靠。
takeaway.en: Punching shear review is fundamentally about geometry and load path. A slab-column joint may look like a local check, but it controls robustness, construction tolerance, and brittle failure risk in flat-plate systems. In cross-code communication, drawing the control perimeter and load eccentricity is more reliable than directly comparing one concrete shear-resistance formula.

title.zh: 参考实例：同一柱反力下，控制周长减少会怎样放大冲切剪应力？
title.en: Reference example: how does a smaller control perimeter amplify punching shear stress under the same column reaction?

intro.zh: 假设同一块楼板在两个位置有相同设计剪力 VEd 和有效高度 d。内柱可以形成完整控制周长 u1；边柱因楼板边界缺失，可用周长更短。忽略弯矩偏心差异时，设计剪应力与控制周长成反比。
intro.en: Assume the same slab has the same design shear VEd and effective depth d at two column locations. An interior column can develop a full control perimeter u1; an edge column has a shorter available perimeter because part of the slab is absent. Ignoring moment-eccentricity differences, design shear stress is inversely proportional to the control perimeter.

label.zh: 欧洲规范的设计冲切剪应力表达
无抗冲切钢筋时的混凝土抗力模型

equations.formula: vRd,c = [CRd,c k (100 ρl fck)^(1/3) + k1 σcp] ≥ vmin + k1 σcp

label.zh: 简化筛查：周长减少导致的需求放大
label.en: Simplified screen: demand amplification caused by perimeter reduction

citation.zh: 由 EN 1992-1-1:2004, 6.4.3, Eq. (6.38) 在相同 VEd、d 和 β 假设下推导；仅用于概念筛查。
citation.en: Derived from EN 1992-1-1:2004, 6.4.3, Eq. (6.38), assuming the same VEd, d, and β; for conceptual screening only.

note.zh: 例如内柱控制周长为 4.8 m，边柱有效控制周长为 3.2 m，在相同 VEd、d 和 β 下，边柱名义冲切剪应力约为内柱的 4.8 / 3.2 = 1.5 倍。实际设计还必须考虑边柱弯矩传递、开洞、柱帽、抗冲切钢筋和规范指定的最外控制周长。
note.en: For example, if an interior-column control perimeter is 4.8 m and an edge-column effective perimeter is 3.2 m, then under the same VEd, d, and β, the nominal punching shear stress at the edge column is about 4.8 / 3.2 = 1.5 times the interior-column value. Real design must also consider edge-column moment transfer, openings, drop panels or column heads, punching reinforcement, and the code-specified outer control perimeter.

references: Wahab et al., Comparative Analysis of Shear Strength Prediction Models for Reinforced Concrete Slab-Column Connections, arXiv:2311.12824.

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Slab-column shear strength model comparison
ACI: ACI 318 Building Code Requirements for Structural Concrete
